title: berkheya cuneata
intro: Berkheya cuneata is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to the southwestern Cape region of South Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and fever. The health benefits of Berkheya cuneata include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be made into a tea or infused in oil to extract its medicinal compounds.
